info.title: Nuobuddy API
info.description: AI Agent Chatbot Backend API powered by Dify.ai. Provides user authentication, conversation management, and streaming chat integration with Dify.

get.description: Returns the current runtime health status of the server including uptime, memory usage, and timestamp.

post.description: Creates a new user account. Password must be at least 6 characters.
Authenticates a user with email and password. Returns a JWT token.

get.description: Returns the profile of the authenticated user.

post.description: Updates the username and/or password of the authenticated user. At least one field must be provided.
Sends a password reset verification code to the user's email. Rate limited to one request per 60 seconds. Always returns success to prevent email enumeration.

200.description: If the email exists, a verification code has been sent

post.description: Resets the user's password using a verification code sent via email.

get.description: Returns information about the Chat API endpoints.
Returns a list of all conversations for the authenticated user, ordered by creation time (newest first).

post.description: Creates a new conversation for the authenticated user.
Deletes a conversation and its associated messages. Only the conversation owner can delete it.
Sends a message to the Dify AI agent and receives a streaming response via Server-Sent Events. The response is piped directly from Dify to the client in real-time.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The conversation ID (UUID). Use empty string for new conversation.

post.summary: Upload a file for chat message
post.description: Uploads one file to Dify for later use in chat message files payload. Requires authentication.

get.description: Returns binary preview content for a previously uploaded file. Requires authentication and the same user context used during upload.

post.description: Creates a shareable link for the conversation by setting the share field to true. Requires authentication and conversation ownership.

delete.description: Cancels the shareable link for the conversation by setting the share field to false. Requires authentication and conversation ownership.

get.description: Retrieves a conversation with its messages. When share=1 query parameter is provided, checks if the conversation is shared and validates access permissions. Does not require authentication for shared links.

parameters.name: share
parameters.description: Set to '1' to access as shared link (no authentication required)

403.description: Forbidden - conversation not shared or access denied

example.message: This conversation is not shared or you don't have access

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all users. Requires admin role.

post.description: Creates a new user account. Requires admin role.
Permanently deletes a user account. Requires admin role.
Resets a user's password to a new value. Requires admin role.

400.description: Password must be at least 6 characters

post.description: Enables or disables a user account. Requires admin role.

get.description: Returns all system settings. Requires admin role.

put.description: Batch updates system settings. Uses upsert operation - keys that don't exist will be created. Requires admin role.

get.summary: Get weekly new users over past 6 months
get.description: Returns weekly new user registrations for the past 6 months. Weeks are calculated in UTC and include zero-value weeks for charting.

get.summary: Get daily conversation count over past 7 days
get.description: Returns daily new conversation counts for the past 7 days in UTC, including zero-value days.
Returns total number of users as a standalone analytics metric.
Returns total number of conversations as a standalone analytics metric.
Returns information about the Common API endpoints.

query.description: The user's message to the AI agent

files.description: Optional local file attachments uploaded via /chat/files/upload

attachments.description: Optional persisted metadata for uploaded files. Must match files by upload_file_id.

transfer_method.description: Only local_file is supported by this backend

fileType.description: Normalized file type used by chat UI

isActive.description: Whether the user account is active

SSEStreamResponse.description:
Server-Sent Events stream with the following event types:
- `delta`: Partial AI response content
- `done`: Stream completed with metadata
- `error`: Error occurred
- `ping`: Heartbeat (can be ignored)

difyConversationId.description: Dify's conversation ID (set after first message)
